bake.example: My mother likes to bake bread.

bakery.example_zh: 這家麵包店賣新鮮蛋糕。

balance.example: It is hard to keep your balance on ice.
She balanced the book on her head.
balance.example_zh: 她把書頂在頭上保持平衡。

balcony.example: She grows flowers on the balcony.

balloon.example: The child held a red balloon.
balloon.example_zh: 那個孩子拿著一顆紅氣球。

bar.example: He ate a bar of chocolate.
They met at a bar downtown.
bar.example_zh: 他們在市中心的酒吧碰面。

barbecue.example: We had a barbecue in the park.

barber.example: The barber cut my hair short.
barber.example_zh: 理髮師把我的頭髮剪短。

bark.example: The dog began to bark loudly.
The bark of this tree is rough.

base.example: The lamp has a heavy base.
base.example_zh: 這盞燈有個很重的底座。

base.example: The movie is based on a true story.
base.example_zh: 這部電影根據真實故事改編。

basic.example: These are the basic rules of the game.
basic.example_zh: 這些是遊戲的基本規則。

basics.example: First learn the basics of cooking.

basis.example: We meet on a weekly basis.

bathe.example: She bathes the baby every evening.

battle.example_zh: 士兵們贏得了這場戰役。

battle.example: She battled the illness for years.

beard.example: My grandfather has a white beard.

beat.example: Our team beat them by two points.
beat.example_zh: 我們這隊以兩分擊敗他們。

beat.example: We danced to the beat of the music.
beat.example_zh: 我們隨著音樂的節拍跳舞。

beauty.example: We admired the beauty of the sunset.
This garden is a real beauty.

beer.example: Adults may drink beer, but not children.
beer.example_zh: 大人可以喝啤酒，但小孩不行。

beg.example: The dog begged for some food.

beginner.example_zh: 這門課是給初學者上的。

behave.example: Please behave well at the party.

belief.example: She has a strong belief in herself.

bend.example: Bend your knees when you lift the box.
Slow down at the bend in the road.

better.example: I feel better after some rest.
better.example_zh: 休息之後我覺得好多了。

beyond.example: The mountains are beyond the river.
The price is beyond what I can pay.
beyond.example_zh: 這價格超出我能負擔的範圍。

bill.example: She paid with a hundred-dollar bill.
bill.example_zh: 她用一張百元鈔票付款。

billion.example: There are billions of stars in the sky.

birth.example: We celebrated the birth of the baby.

biscuit.example: She ate a biscuit with her tea.

bit.example: I am a bit tired today.
He gave the bird a bit of bread.

blackboard.example: The teacher wrote on the blackboard.

blame.example: Don't blame others for your mistakes.
blame.example_zh: 別把自己的錯怪到別人頭上。

blame.example: She took the blame for the accident.
blame.example_zh: 她為這場意外承擔責任。

blank.example: Write your name on the blank line.
blank.example_zh: 在空白線上寫下你的名字。

blank.example: Fill in the blank with the right word.

blanket.example: She covered the baby with a warm blanket.
blanket.example_zh: 她用溫暖的毯子蓋住寶寶。

blood.example: The nurse took a sample of my blood.
blood.example_zh: 護理師抽了我的血做檢查。

board.example: We wrote the plan on the board.
board.example_zh: 我們把計畫寫在板子上。

board.example: Passengers may now board the plane.

boil.example: Please boil the water before drinking.

bone.example: The dog buried a bone in the yard.
bone.example_zh: 那隻狗把骨頭埋在院子裡。

bookstore.example: I bought a novel at the bookstore.
bookstore.example_zh: 我在書店買了一本小說。

border.example: They crossed the border into Canada.
border.example_zh: 他們越過邊界進入加拿大。

border.example: The handkerchief has a lace border.

bother.example: Sorry to bother you, but I need help.
bother.example_zh: 抱歉打擾你，但我需要幫忙。

bother.example: Don't bother to wait for me.

brain.example: Reading is good exercise for the brain.
brain.example_zh: 閱讀是很好的腦力運動。

branch.example: A bird sat on the branch of the tree.
The bank opened a new branch here.
branch.example_zh: 這家銀行在這裡開了分行。

brand.example: This is my favorite brand of shoes.
brand.example_zh: 這是我最喜歡的鞋子品牌。

brief.example: He gave a brief talk about the trip.
brief.example_zh: 他簡短地談了這趟旅行。

brief.example: The manager briefed us on the plan.
brief.example_zh: 經理向我們簡報這個計畫。

brilliant.example_zh: 她想到一個很棒的點子。

broad.example: The river is very broad here.

brush.example: He cleaned the floor with a brush.
Brush your teeth twice a day.

building.example: That tall building is a hospital.

bun.example: She ate a soft bun for breakfast.
bun.example_zh: 她早餐吃了一個鬆軟的小麵包。

burden.example: The heavy bag was a burden to carry.
burden.example_zh: 那個重袋子提起來很吃力。

burden.example: Caring for the family is a heavy burden.
burden.example_zh: 照顧家庭是沉重的負擔。

burn.example: Be careful not to burn your hand.
She got a burn from the hot pan.

burst.example: The balloon burst with a loud bang.

businessman.example: Her father is a busy businessman.
businessman.example_zh: 她父親是個忙碌的商人。

caf-cafe.example: We had coffee at a small cafe.
caf-cafe.example_zh: 我們在一家小咖啡館喝咖啡。
